    multimedia/*pipe-viewer: Update to 0.3.1

     - add .desktop file
     - pet portclippy
     - reformat with portfmt
     - drop WWW::PipeViewer::Authentication: unused and unsupported
     - drop WWW::PipeViewer::PlaylistItems::favorite_video: unused and unsupported
